consignor.certificate_value: SOIC Trade and Logistics AB C/O Greencarrier AB Box 1076 40522, Göteborg Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: SOIC Trade and Logistics AB Torgny Segerstedtsgatan 80 Gothenburg 40522 Sweden
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'SOIC Trade and Logistics AB' from the certificate is explicitly found in the invoice's issuer name and address with allowed normalization and minor address differences. The country Sweden matches exactly after normalization. No conflicting party names were found. Therefore, consignor matches per rules 4.1.0 and 4.1.4.

consignee.certificate_value: Astro Carton Honduras S.A. de C.V. Prolongación 27 Calle, Contiguo a Z Astro Honduras, Co. Felipe Zelaya San Pedro Sula 21101 Honduras
consignee.invoice_value: Astro Carton Honduras S.A. de C.V. Prolongación 27 Calle, Contiguo a Zona Libre Astro Honduras, Co. Felipe Zelaya San Pedro Sula 21101 Honduras
consignee.motivation: Consignee 'Astro Carton Honduras S.A. de C.V.' is explicitly found in the invoice in the 'Invoice To' field with allowed normalization (e.g. 'Contiguo a Z' vs 'Contiguo a Zona Libre'). The country Honduras matches exactly. Thus, consignee match is confirmed following rules 4.2.0, 4.2.2.1, and 4.2.3.

goods_description.invoice_value: Testliner 2 BW 125gsm, RW 1300mm, BW 125gsm, RW 1350mm, BW 125gsm, RW 1400mm, BW 125gsm, RW 1450mm, BW 125gsm, RW 1700mm, BW 125gsm, RW 1750mm, BW 125gsm, RW 1850mm
goods_description.motivation: Goods description 'TESTLINER HS CODE 4805 25' from the certificate matches the invoice items described as 'Testliner' with related specifications. No article numbers in the certificate to require item-level exact matching, but the HS code and product description are consistent. Therefore, goods description matches under rule 4.3.2.

quantity.motivation: Quantity of 52.992 MT and 30 rolls matches exactly with invoice total quantities. Units and numeric values correspond, and no conflicting quantities found. Tolerances are respected. Thus, quantity matches according to 4.4.1 and 4.4.3.

origin.motivation: Certificate origin 'EU GERMANY' matches invoice origin 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: GERMANY' after applying EU normalization rules. Germany is an EU member state and explicitly stated in invoice. Origin is thus confirmed per 4.5.4.1 and 4.5.5.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All control points (consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, and origin) matched successfully with no contradictions or missing data.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter i certifikatet kan verifieras mot fakturan utan avvikelser. Dokumenten är konsekventa och kan godkännas automatiskt.
